name: Aaronson Tiramisu
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks with 1/2 cup sugar until light in color and the batter forms a ribbon when the beater is lifted; the batter should not plop off the beater but fall back on itself.
2. Add the mascarpone, beating well, then fold in the heavy cream. Place in the refrigerator to cool.
3. Mix 2 cups strong coffee with 1/4 cup sugar and the Kahlua, liqueurs until the sugar dissolves completely.
4. In a large bowl, pour half of the mascarpone mixture. Dip ladyfingers one at a time into the coffee mixture until they are moistened but not dripping.
5. Cover the cream layer with the dipped ladyfingers. Pour the remaining mascarpone mixture over the ladyfingers, smoothing with a spatula.
6. Sprinkle chopped bittersweet chocolate over the top.
7. Refrigerate for at least 8 hours; overnight is best.
8. Serve cold.
